trustedSourceSummary: Fresh official consumer updates were combined with the latest archived comparison pages from 2025-2026. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2026 pasta brand test lists BARILLA and AGNESI as recommended options, indicating they meet quality and taste criteria.
